label_notes: Source: training knowledge (2026-03-20). WebFetch blocked due to network egress restrictions. Tripadvisor is primarily a review and travel information platform with optional booking features through partners. Note that user-generated content (reviews, photos) has different handling than personal data. VERIFY all claims against current live policy before publication.
